title: Senior Software Engineer - Backend
description: We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our Payments Infrastructure team. You will design and build highly scalable distributed systems that process millions of transactions per day. You'll work with Python, Go, and Ruby to build mission-critical payment systems.
requirements: 5+ years backend engineering experience. Strong proficiency in Python or Go. Experience with distributed systems, high availability. SQL/PostgreSQL expertise. Experience with microservices architecture.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our team building next-generation AI systems. You'll work on training large language models, building evaluation pipelines, and deploying ML systems at scale. Deep expertise in PyTorch and distributed training required.
requirements: 3+ years ML engineering. Strong Python skills. PyTorch or TensorFlow proficiency. Experience with large-scale model training. MS or PhD in CS/ML preferred.

title: Data Analyst
description: Drive data-informed decisions across Airbnb's marketplace. You'll analyze large datasets, build dashboards, and partner with product and engineering teams to improve host and guest experiences. Strong SQL and Python required.
requirements: 3+ years data analysis experience. Expert SQL skills. Python (Pandas, NumPy). Experience with Tableau or similar BI tools. Strong communication skills.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Build the next generation of collaborative design tools. You'll work across the stack using TypeScript, React, and Node.js to create delightful user experiences for millions of designers worldwide.
requirements: 3+ years full-stack experience. TypeScript and React proficiency. Node.js backend experience. Understanding of browser rendering, WebGL a plus.

title: Business Development Manager
description: Lead strategic partnerships and enterprise sales for Salesforce CRM products. You'll manage key accounts, develop go-to-market strategies, and build relationships with C-suite executives.
requirements: 5+ years B2B sales or BD experience. Track record of hitting revenue targets. Excellent communication and negotiation skills. Experience with CRM platforms.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain the infrastructure that streams to 200+ million subscribers. You'll work with AWS, Kubernetes, and Terraform to ensure 99.99% uptime for our global platform.
requirements: 5+ years DevOps/SRE experience. Deep AWS knowledge. Kubernetes and Docker expertise. Infrastructure as code with Terraform. Python or Go scripting.

title: Data Scientist - NLP
description: Join Google's Search team to improve natural language understanding at scale. You'll develop novel NLP models, run A/B experiments, and ship features that improve search quality for billions of users.
requirements: PhD or Master's in CS/Statistics/ML. 3+ years NLP research or engineering. PyTorch/TensorFlow. Strong Python and SQL. Publication record a plus.

title: Python Backend Developer
description: Build the APIs powering our retail investing platform. Work with Python, Django, and PostgreSQL to handle high-frequency trading data and real-time portfolio updates.
requirements: 3+ years Python backend. Django or FastAPI experience. PostgreSQL and Redis. REST API design. Understanding of financial systems a plus.

title: Product Manager - Growth
description: Drive user growth and engagement on LinkedIn's professional network. You'll define product strategy, run experiments, and collaborate with engineering and design to ship impactful features.
requirements: 3+ years product management. Data-driven mindset with SQL/analytics skills. Experience running A/B tests. Strong communication with executive stakeholders.

title: iOS Engineer
description: Build iOS features used by over a billion iPhone users. You'll work in Swift on CoreML, ARKit, and new iOS APIs, collaborating closely with hardware and design teams.
requirements: 5+ years iOS development. Expert Swift skills. Deep understanding of UIKit and SwiftUI. Experience with Core ML or AR frameworks. App Store release experience.

title: Frontend Engineer - React
description: Help build the best developer experience on the web. Work on Next.js and the Vercel dashboard with TypeScript and React, creating tools used by millions of developers globally.
requirements: 3+ years React experience. TypeScript proficiency. Understanding of web performance, Core Web Vitals. Experience with Next.js preferred.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build lakehouse architectures and data pipelines for Fortune 500 customers. You'll work with Apache Spark, Delta Lake, and Python to design scalable ETL solutions.
requirements: 4+ years data engineering. Apache Spark expertise. Python proficiency. SQL and data warehousing. Experience with cloud data platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure).
